Abstract of Will of William Grigle or Grigges
memoryArtifacts.description:
Braintree, Essex, England, yeoman.  18 Oct 1575; proved 10 Jun 1577

To be buried in the church or churchyard there.  Lands and tenements in Boeking.  Wife Alice to have lands, tenements, etc. in Brai …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Thomas Mott於1523年出生在英國英格蘭艾可布萊崔時，他的父親John Thomas Mott26歲，母親Alice Harrington21歲。他於1540年與Alice Mead在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年11月11日在英國英格蘭艾可波金享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Thomas Mott于1523年出生在英国英格兰艾可布萊崔时，他的父亲John Thomas Mott26岁，母亲Alice Harrington21岁。他于1540年与Alice Mead在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年11月11日在英国英格兰艾可波金享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅。

nameMeanings.name: Mott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Motte, a pet form of Matilda. There has probably been some confusion with Moat .
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned property in a marshy area, from Middle High German mot ‘mud, swamp’.

variants.name: Motts
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Mott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Moat
meanings: English: from Middle English mote ‘moat, protective ditch’ (Old French mote, motte ‘mound, embankment’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at or by a moat, or habitational, from one of many minor places so named in England and Scotland. There has probably been some confusion with Mott .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Thomas Mott was born in 1523, in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thomas Mott, was 26 and his mother, Alice Harrington, was 21. He married Alice Mead in 1540, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 November 1556, in Bocking, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33, and was buried in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alice Mead en 1540, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1556, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1540 in England Alice Mead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1556 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Bocking, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: John Thomas Mott(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Mott(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Harrington(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1540년 영국에서 Alice Mead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 11월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 보킨그에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 스트 폴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Thomas Mott родился в 1523 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thomas Mott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Harrington, 21.
